name: Chocolate Mousse - Master Chefs
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cream, whipping, whipped (to soft peaks)
4 oz Chocolate, semi-sweet (melted, cooled to room temperature)
recipeInstructions:
For Mousse:
1. Heat sugar and water in a heavy saucepan over medium-low heat until sugar dissolves. Stir occasionally and brush down any crystals from the sides of the pan with a cold water-dipped brush.
2. Increase heat and boil until the mixture registers 240°F (soft ball stage) on a candy thermometer.
3. Meanwhile, beat egg whites and cream of tartar until soft peaks form.
4. Slowly pour in the hot syrup while beating to ensure even distribution. Let cool for about 5 minutes.
5. Gently fold in the whipped cream, cocoa, melted chocolate, and espresso into the mixture.
6. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
